helper_status.interpretation: Same as iter1 — no APF helper keys in window scope, NO renderer-side helper. Warning render achieved purely through engine-side WSS frame injection (iter2 relaxed handshake detector finally allowed engine to identify completion of SignalR handshake on TCP-coalesced bufs and inject the SignalR-format chat frame containing the 차단 text).

wss_observations.post_handshake_action: Engine successfully detected SignalR handshake completion (relaxed substring scan) and injected warning frame into client-bound stream — instead of close-1006 fallback observed in iter1

diagnosis.iter2_handshake_relaxed_assessment: BREAKTHROUGH — relaxed substring scan resolved the iter1 root cause where strict 5-byte payload_len framing missed all TCP-coalesced bufs. Engine now correctly identifies 'handshake_completed' on larger TCP buffers, after which the warning-frame injection path executes successfully. WSS no longer closed with 1006; instead a SignalR-format frame containing the 차단 message reaches the client and the React app renders the security block page.
diagnosis.comparison_to_985: #985 FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: handshake parse OK (status 101), but engine could not detect handshake-complete on coalesced bufs → fell back to forced close (code 1006) → 'Something went wrong' generic error. #986 OK: relaxed detector recognizes handshake-complete → warning frame injected → React renders proper 차단 block page with security warning Korean+English text. **Same architectural pattern as wrtn but solved without needing renderer-side helper** — pure network-layer SignalR frame synthesis.
diagnosis.helper_irrelevant: Initial concern that m365_copilot helper might be undefined (analogous to wrtn) turned out to be moot for the OK case: warning rendering does NOT require a renderer-side helper because the engine injects a fully-formed SignalR chat completion frame which the React app processes through its normal message-rendering pipeline.

notes: iter2 handshake-relaxed fix is a clean BREAKTHROUGH. Page transitioned to dedicated block conversation URL with title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단'. Body content confirms: '⚠️ 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. / (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)'. No console errors. Engine intercept fired AND DOM render succeeded — full E2E success vs. iter1 partial (intercept fired, render failed). Mission achieved.
